The Toyota Alphard 2020 is a premium luxury MPV designed for families, executives, and VIP transportation. It combines exceptional comfort, a spacious cabin, and Toyota’s renowned reliability, making it one of the most prestigious people carriers in its class. 

2020 Toyota Alphard – Description

* Luxury 8-seater MPV
* 2.5L petrol
* CVT automatic transmission
* Available in FWD or 4WD configurations
* Dual power sliding doors
* Premium leather interior with captain seats
* Tri-zone automatic climate control
* Advanced safety features including Toyota Safety Sense on many variants
* Large infotainment and entertainment system
* Exceptional ride comfort and cabin quietness
* Length: approximately 4,950 mm
* Wheelbase: 3,000 mm 

Professional Description

“The 2020 Toyota Alphard is a premium luxury MPV that offers first-class comfort, sophisticated styling, and advanced technology. With its spacious cabin, executive seating, smooth ride quality, and refined performance, the Alphard delivers an exceptional travel experience for both families and corporate users. Its elegant design, premium interior finishes, and renowned Toyota reliability make it one of the most sought-after luxury vans in the market.”

The 2026 JMC VIGUS PRO brand new double cabin pickup trucks designed to deliver power, durability, comfort, and modern technology for both commercial and personal use. Built on a strong and reliable ladder-frame chassis, these pickups are ideal for city driving, long-distance travel, off-road performance, and heavy-duty work applications.

Available now at Amjad Motors International Limited, located on Kawawa Road, both models come with 0KM mileage and offer a premium driving experience combined with excellent load-carrying capability and advanced safety features.
